pages.name: construcontrol-dashboard
pages.title: ConstruControl · Centro de control

pages.name: construcontrol-migration-console
pages.title: ConstruControl · Migración segura

reports.name: FI01 Estado de Cuenta
reports.query: select name as "Fuente:Link/CC Funding Source:180", date_received as "Fecha recibida:Date:110", sender as "Remitente:Data:180", remittance_company as "Remesadora:Data:150", bank as "Banco:Data:130", reference as "Referencia:Data:140", amount_hnl as "Recibido:Currency:120", spent_hnl as "Gastado:Currency:120", pending_hnl as "Pendiente:Currency:120", available_hnl as "Disponible:Currency:120", projected_hnl as "Proyectado:Currency:120" from `tabCC Funding Source` where ifnull(is_logically_deleted,0)=0 order by date_received desc, modified desc

reports.name: FI02 Consolidado General
reports.query: select posting_date as "Fecha:Date:100", unit as "Unidad:Data:80", quantity as "Cantidad:Float:90", description as "Descripción:Data:260", commercial_source as "Fuente:Data:150", provider_name as "Proveedor:Data:180", amount_hnl as "Total:Currency:130" from `tabCC Expense Control` where ifnull(is_logically_deleted,0)=0 order by posting_date asc, creation asc

reports.name: CO01 Estado Contractual
reports.query: select name as "Contrato:Link/CC Labor Contract:180", contractor_name as "Contratista:Data:190", status as "Estado:Data:100", start_date as "Inicio:Date:100", target_end_date as "Fin previsto:Date:100", project_value_hnl as "Valor contractual:Currency:140", paid_hnl as "Pagado FI02:Currency:130", balance_hnl as "Saldo:Currency:130" from `tabCC Labor Contract` where ifnull(is_logically_deleted,0)=0 order by start_date desc, modified desc
